name: Platform v3 Migration
description: Decompose the Flow API monolith into independent microservices to improve scalability fault isolation and independent deployment cadence. Target: 6 independently deployable services by EOY 2026.

name: Enterprise SSO Integration
description: Implement full SAML 2.0 and OIDC enterprise SSO capabilities allowing large enterprise customers to authenticate via their own identity providers (Okta Ping Azure AD). Required for 14 blocked enterprise deals.

name: Real-time Analytics Dashboard v2
description: Rebuild the Insights dashboard with sub-second query response times customizable widget library and AI-powered anomaly detection. Prerequisite: ClickHouse migration (complete).
